packs.name: sentinella_stealers
packs.description: Detection rules for Discord token theft, browser credential harvesting, crypto wallet theft, and webhook-based exfiltration.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_scripts
packs.description: Detection rules for PowerShell abuse, encoded commands, AMSI bypass, Defender tampering, certutil abuse, and JavaScript obfuscation.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_deception
packs.description: Detection rules for PyInstaller abuse, Node.js SEA, persistence mechanisms, fake documents, weaponized Electron apps, and cryptominers.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_github_stealers
packs.description: Detection rules for fake game mods, updaters, and cracked software distributed via GitHub that are actually information stealers.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_lolbins
packs.description: Detection rules for Living-Off-The-Land binary abuse: mshta, regsvr32, WMIC, rundll32, CMSTP, and forfiles.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_documents
packs.description: Detection rules for malicious PDFs, Office macros, weaponized LNK shortcuts, and ISO/IMG droppers.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_persistence
packs.description: Detection rules for scheduled task persistence, WMI event subscriptions, COM object hijacking, DLL search order hijacking, and UAC bypass.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_ransomware
packs.description: Detection rules for ransomware encryption, shadow copy deletion, ransom notes, LockBit 3.0, BlackCat/ALPHV, and Akira patterns.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_dotnet_obfuscation
packs.description: Detection rules for ConfuserEx/.NET Reactor obfuscation, reflection loading, process injection, and credential stealers.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_droppers
packs.description: Detection rules for AutoIt droppers, HTA payloads, self-extracting archives, temp directory patterns, and embedded ZIP payloads.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_powershell_advanced
packs.description: Deep detection of PowerShell cradles, AMSI patch bytes, ETW bypass, base64 chains, and rundll32 proxy execution.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_browser_hijack
packs.description: Detection rules for browser extension sideloading, proxy injection, root certificate installation, and history exfiltration.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_credential_tools
packs.description: Detection rules for Mimikatz 2.2+, LaZagne, Pypykatz, LSASS dumping, DPAPI extraction, and keyloggers.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_suspicious_updaters
packs.description: Detection rules for fake updaters with download+execute, unsigned updaters, DLL sideloading, and trojanized installers.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_c2_indicators
packs.description: Detection rules for Cobalt Strike 4.x, Sliver C2, DNS-over-HTTPS tunneling, Telegram bots, Discord webhooks, and raw socket beaconing.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_stealer_exfil
packs.description: Detection rules for ZIP-and-send exfiltration, screenshot capture, WiFi password harvesting, and Telegram session theft.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_evasion_techniques
packs.description: Detection rules for sandbox/VM detection, delayed execution, ntdll unhooking, PPID spoofing, and event log tampering.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_crypto_threats
packs.description: Detection rules for wallet theft, clipboard address replacement, browser extension wallet theft, and seed phrase hunting.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_backdoor_rat
packs.description: Detection rules for remote shells, persistent backdoors with network beaconing, and reverse-connection RATs.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_worm_propagation
packs.description: Detection rules for autorun.inf creation, removable drive self-copying, and network share spreading.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_generic_trojan
packs.description: Detection rules for download-execute chains, self-copy persistence, hidden window execution, and spyware combos.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_packed_obfuscated
packs.description: Detection rules for Nuitka-compiled Python, high-entropy PE files, batch-to-EXE compilers, and Go-based stealers.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_generic_spyware
packs.description: Detection rules for webcam capture, audio recording, and geolocation tracking.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_ai_abuse
packs.description: Detection rules for fake AI tool installers, LLM API key theft, prompt injection in documents, and deepfake tool distribution.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_infostealer_2026
packs.description: Detection rules for Chromium v127+ cookie bypass, DPAPI abuse, MFA authenticator theft, SSH key harvesting, cloud credential theft, and password manager targeting.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_electron_abuse
packs.description: Detection rules for malicious Electron apps, asar manipulation, node_modules trojanization, Discord injection, and preload script abuse.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_supply_chain
packs.description: Detection rules for typosquatted packages, malicious install scripts, dependency confusion, compromised update mechanisms, and build artifact tampering.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_defense_evasion_2026
packs.description: Detection rules for AMSI/ETW bypass, Defender exclusion abuse, process hollowing, direct syscalls, Heaven's Gate, and API unhooking.
packs.author: Sentinella

packs.name: sentinella_loader_techniques
packs.description: Detection rules for DLL sideloading, reflective DLL injection, .NET Assembly.Load, PowerShell cradles, LOLBin proxy execution, and ISO/VHD MotW bypass.
